taskSummary: Remove the legacy static public/css/tabs.css stylesheet completely, remove journals page references to it, and confirm GOV.UK tabs styling is owned by generated GOV.UK Frontend CSS rather than a legacy override.

selectedBundles.reason: Repository safety, branch governance, PR discipline, trace and CI behaviour.
ResearchOps page, generated-output and route-state contracts.
GOV.UK tabs component styling, accessibility and frontend component ownership.

skippedBundles.reason: No Worker, Pages routing, D1, KV, R2 or deployment logic changed.
No OpenAI API, model or retrieval behaviour changed.
No MCP server, client or tool contract changed.

precedenceDecisions: GitHub Diamond governed branch, PR and trace behaviour.
ResearchOps Developer Control governed source and rendered page parity.
GOV.UK Design System governed the tab component ownership decision.

The legacy public/css/tabs.css file was removed rather than regenerated from Sass because the correct tab component CSS already comes from public/assets/govuk/govuk-frontend.css, generated from src/styles/govuk.scss by the build:govuk script.
implementationSummary: Removed the /css/tabs.css link from the journals Nunjucks source.
Removed the matching /css/tabs.css link from the committed rendered journals page.
Deleted the static legacy public/css/tabs.css file.
Added route-state assertions that the Nunjucks source, rendered page and generated CSS target manifest do not reference tabs.css or src/styles/tabs.scss.
Left GOV.UK tabs component styling under the generated GOV.UK Frontend CSS path.
mutationStrategy: Used the available GitHub contents API wrappers for small text replacements and delete-file wrapper for the removed legacy CSS asset. Branch diff was checked after implementation.

automatedReviewComments.disposition: No review threads were present at the time of this trace. Later legitimate Codex or automated review comments must be acknowledged with a thumbs-up reaction, replied to with evidence and resolved only after the fix is complete.

validation.notRunReason: The repository could not be cloned from the sandbox and the connector does not execute repository scripts.

residualRisks: The PR remains draft until repository validation commands have run.
Visual verification on the branch preview is still useful because the user-reported issue was visual CSS override behaviour.
The custom /components/tabs.js controller remains in scope for later review. It is not the CSS override being removed here.
